200.q: How many Dragon Balls summon Shenron?
Who is the Namekian mentor of Gohan?
What galactic tyrant destroys Planet Vegeta?
What android marries Krillin?
What company is run by Bulma's family?
What pink magical villain dominates the Buu Saga?
What earring method also fuses two warriors?
What god of destruction loves food and naps?
What tournament risks entire universes in Dragon Ball Super?
What childlike ruler can erase universes?
What Saiyan power-up happens after recovering from near death?
What is Goku's Saiyan name?
What dragon grants wishes on Earth?
What planet was Goku sent from?
What is Goku's Saiyan birth name?
What planet are Goku and Vegeta from?
Who is Goku's best friend since childhood?
Who raises Goku on Earth?
What color is Piccolo's skin?
Who is Goku's wife?
What is Goku's wife's name?
Who is Goku's oldest son?
What is the green Namekian friend of Goku called?
How many Dragon Balls must you collect to summon Shenron?
What are the Dragon Balls?
200.a: Seven magic balls — when gathered, they summon a dragon that grants wishes

200.q: Who is Goku?
200.a: Earth's greatest hero — a Saiyan raised on Earth who repeatedly saves the universe

200.q: Who is Vegeta?
200.a: The prince of the Saiyan race — Goku's rival who becomes an ally

200.q: What is a Saiyan?
200.a: A warrior alien race — Goku and Vegeta's species — they grow stronger after near-death

200.q: What is Goku's first transformation?
200.a: Super Saiyan — triggered by rage over Krillin's death

200.q: Who is Frieza?
200.a: A galactic tyrant who destroyed Planet Vegeta — the primary villain of the Namek arc

200.q: Who is Gohan?
200.a: Goku's son — he defeats Cell and briefly becomes the strongest character in DBZ

200.q: What is the Kamehameha?
Who are the Z Fighters?
200.a: The group of heroes protecting Earth — Goku, Gohan, Vegeta, Krillin, Piccolo, etc.

200.q: What is a Spirit Bomb?
200.a: Goku's ultimate technique — he gathers energy from all living things into a massive ball

400.q: What fusion of Goku and Vegeta uses the Fusion Dance?
What guardian originally creates Earth's Dragon Balls?
What fusion of Goku and Vegeta uses Potara earrings?
What android absorbs 17 and 18?
What planet was Vegeta prince of?
What device measures power levels?
What red-haired god form does Goku achieve first?
What race is Frieza?
What martial arts tournament recurs through the series?
What is Piccolo originally connected to?
What company does Bulma's family run?
What is Gohan's wife called?
What tournament often decides Earth's strongest fighters?
What are the magical orbs that grant wishes called?
Who is the wish-granting dragon on Earth?
What room accelerates training a year per day?
What fusion dance creates Gogeta?
Who is Goku's martial arts master?
What island does Master Roshi live on?
Who is Goku's first son?
What is Trunks' mother's name?
Who is Cell?
400.a: An android created from the DNA of the strongest fighters — he seeks to absorb Androids 17 and 18 to reach his perfect form

400.q: What is the Cell Games?
400.a: Cell's tournament where he fights Earth's warriors one by one

400.q: Who is Majin Buu?
400.a: An ancient magical being of immense power — initially a pink, childlike creature that becomes increasingly dangerous

400.q: What is the Hyperbolic Time Chamber?
400.a: A room where one year passes for every day outside — used for intense training

400.q: Who is Android 18?
400.a: One of Dr. Gero's androids — she later marries Krillin

400.q: What is fusion?
400.a: Two warriors merging into one — Potara Fusion (earrings) and Fusion Dance (hand technique)

400.q: What is Gohan's Ultimate/Mystic form?
400.a: A power-up unlocked by Elder Kai — it gives Gohan his full potential without transforming

400.q: Who is Piccolo?
400.a: A Namekian who was initially Goku's enemy — he becomes Gohan's mentor and a Z Fighter

400.q: What killed Goku the first time?
400.a: He uses his instant transmission to take Cell to King Kai's planet when Cell is about to explode

400.q: Who is Broly?
400.a: A Legendary Super Saiyan of immense power — the movie villain whose power level is incomprehensible

600.q: What godly state lets Goku move without conscious thought?
What tournament puts multiple universes at risk of erasure?
What ruler can erase universes instantly?
What technique boosts Goku's power after King Kai's training?
What is Beerus's divine title?
What is the fusion of Goten and Trunks called?
What is Goku's father's name?
What is Future Trunks's mentor's name in his timeline?
What angel trains Goku and Vegeta?
What is Vegeta's younger brother called?
What object stores Master Roshi's sealing technique?
What android pair are siblings?
What is Gohan's scholarly profession later in life?
What move does Vegeta often shout before firing a beam?
What is Frieza's father called?
What destroyer god loves pudding?
What android scientist creates Cell?
What is the Namekian wish dragon called?
What is Trunks's mother called?
What form does Gohan unlock in Super Hero?
What earring method creates Vegito?
Who is the Namekian wish dragon?
What is the race that Frieza rules over?
What Z Fighter trains Gohan through the early Z saga?
What is Trunks's mother's profession?
What is Goku's signature defensive stance?
What is Ultra Instinct?
600.a: A godly technique where the body moves automatically without thought — Goku achieves it against Jiren in Super

600.q: What is the Tournament of Power?
600.a: A battle royale between the strongest warriors of eight universes — losers' universes are erased

600.q: What is the significance of Vegeta's Saiyan pride?
600.a: His pride is his greatest strength and weakness — his arc is learning to fight for others, not just pride

600.q: What is the Zenkai boost?
600.a: The Saiyan ability to grow stronger after nearly dying — it explains their exponential power scaling

600.q: Who is Jiren?
600.a: The most powerful mortal in the multiverse — he forced Goku to unlock Ultra Instinct

600.q: What is the Grand Priest?
600.a: The father of the Angels — the most powerful being below the Omni-Kings

600.q: What is the Omni-King Zeno?
600.a: The ruler of all universes — a childlike being of absolute power who erases universes casually

600.q: What is the significance of Gohan's decline in power?
600.a: He stopped training after Cell — in Buu saga he has to rush to reclaim his power. A critique of talent wasted by complacency

600.q: What is the legendary significance of the Raditz fight?
600.a: It introduced power levels as a concept — changing how audiences understood strength in anime

600.q: What is Dragon Ball GT vs Super controversy?
600.a: GT was a non-canon sequel made without Toriyama's involvement; Super is the official continuation but fans debate quality
